judge_result.short_rationale: The canonical response requires fresh air/keep calm, then immediate medical attention for symptomatic inhalation. The answer delays care until symptoms worsen, omitting the required immediate action. It also adds unsupported and wrong-incident instructions (rinse mouth/nose, do not induce vomiting), triggering a critical safety failure.
